items.name: Loaf of Bread
items.description: A warm loaf of crusty bread, fresh from the oven. It smells wonderful.

items.name: Tallow Candle
items.description: A stubby candle of rendered animal fat. It gives off a faint, smoky light.

items.name: Vial of Holy Water
items.description: A small glass vial filled with blessed water. It catches the light with an unusual clarity.

items.name: Dust-Covered Tome
items.description: A heavy, leather-bound book. The pages are brittle and covered in a script you cannot read.

items.name: Silver Amulet
items.description: An amulet on a tarnished chain. A crescent moon is engraved on its face.

items.name: Longbow
items.description: A tall yew bow with a taut string. It's seen better days but still has good draw.

items.name: Quiver of Arrows
items.description: A leather quiver holding a dozen iron-tipped arrows. The fletching is slightly ragged.

items.name: Brass Telescope
items.description: A fine telescope mounted on a brass swivel. It's bolted to the railing and won't budge.

items.name: Jar of Lamp Oil
items.description: A sealed clay jar of whale oil, used to fuel the lighthouse lantern.

items.name: Fishing Rod
items.description: A simple bamboo rod with a line and hook. There's dried bait still on the hook.

items.name: Locked Chest
items.description: A battered iron-bound chest. The lock is rusted but holds firm. Something rattles inside.

items.name: Torn Map
items.description: Half of a hand-drawn map. You can make out a coastline and an X marked in red ink.

items.name: Coil of Rope
items.description: Fifty feet of sturdy hemp rope, coiled neatly. Useful for climbing or binding.

items.name: Crowbar
items.description: A heavy iron crowbar. Good for prying things open — or as an improvised weapon.

items.name: Worn Logbook
items.description: A guard's logbook with faded entries. The last entry reads: "Nothing to report. Gate holds."

items.name: Dull Shortsword
items.description: A short blade with a nicked edge. It needs sharpening, but it's still steel.

items.name: Iron Tongs
items.description: Heavy blacksmith's tongs, warm to the touch. The grips are wrapped in leather.

items.name: Glass Bead Necklace
items.description: A string of colored glass beads. Pretty but not valuable — a trinket for tourists.

items.name: Crumpled Handbill
items.description: A printed handbill advertising a sale at Aldric's Jeweler's. "Half off all glass beads!"

items.name: Silver Coin
items.description: A silver coin stamped with the seal of Northkeep. Worth a decent meal at any tavern.

items.name: Glowing Mushroom
items.description: A soft, bioluminescent mushroom that pulses with blue light. It's cool and slightly damp.

items.name: Tattered Cloak
items.description: A heavy wool cloak, torn and stained. It still offers some warmth despite its condition.

items.name: Bundle of Herbs
items.description: A fragrant bundle of wild herbs — rosemary, thyme, and something you don't recognize.

items.name: Weathered Signpost
items.description: A wooden signpost at the roadside. Carved arrows point in several directions. It's firmly planted.

items.name: Basket of Eggs
items.description: A small wicker basket holding half a dozen brown eggs. They're still warm.

items.name: Rusty Hoe
items.description: A garden hoe with a rusted blade. The handle is worn smooth from years of use.

items.name: Broken Lantern
items.description: A dented iron lantern with cracked glass. It no longer holds oil, but might be repairable.

items.name: Chipped Shield
items.description: A round wooden shield with an iron boss. The rim is chipped and the paint has worn away.

items.name: Gold Ring
items.description: A simple gold band, surprisingly untarnished. There's an inscription inside too small to read.

items.name: Prayer Book
items.description: A slim book bound in white leather. The prayers inside are written in silver ink on vellum.

items.name: Notice Board
items.description: A large wooden board covered in pinned parchments — job postings, wanted notices, and town decrees.

recipes.description: You wedge the crowbar under the chest lid and heave. The lock snaps and the lid flies open, revealing a **gold ring** nestled in rotting velvet.
The lantern is too damaged to repair, but you salvage the wick and oil to fashion a makeshift **tallow candle**.
